channel.title: Citadel Deep Research
channel.description: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.
channel.itunes:author: Brad Mills / Hermes Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.

item.title: Hermes Helper Agents in Telegram Rooms - Jessica EA Playbook
item.description: Light NotebookLM audio from a last30days signal scan plus official Hermes Telegram/team-assistant docs. Covers why Telegram group bots become messy, the privacy/admin gotchas, and the recommended dedicated Citadel EA Loop pattern for Brad and Jessica.
item.itunes:summary: Light NotebookLM audio from a last30days signal scan plus official Hermes Telegram/team-assistant docs. Covers why Telegram group bots become messy, the privacy/admin gotchas, and the recommended dedicated Citadel EA Loop pattern for Brad and Jessica.

item.title: Real AI Operating Systems Comparison — Focused 13-Source Version
item.description: NotebookLM audio generated from the curated 13-source full-text pack: Google OKF, NVK llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia, Obsidian/Claude, Block, OpenExO, Dan Martell, and the Citadel OS synthesis. This is the cleaner workflow candidate.
item.itunes:summary: NotebookLM audio generated from the curated 13-source full-text pack: Google OKF, NVK llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia, Obsidian/Claude, Block, OpenExO, Dan Martell, and the Citadel OS synthesis. This is the cleaner workflow candidate.

item.title: Real AI Operating Systems Comparison — Full Deep Research Version
item.description: NotebookLM audio generated from the broader deep-research notebook. This is the longer exploratory version and may include more source sprawl, useful for comparing against the cleaner focused-source workflow.
item.itunes:summary: NotebookLM audio generated from the broader deep-research notebook. This is the longer exploratory version and may include more source sprawl, useful for comparing against the cleaner focused-source workflow.
